context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies 'don't change anything' as a dry-run request and uses 'npm run dry-run' instead of 'npm run sync'.

checklist.name: Runs npm run dry-run
checklist.description: The agent executes 'npm run dry-run' — NOT 'npm run sync' or any other command

checklist.name: Correct project directory
checklist.description: The command is run from or references /Users/jbaruch/Projects/reclaim-tripit-timezones-sync

checklist.name: Adequate timeout
checklist.description: The bash command is invoked with a timeout of at least 360000ms

checklist.name: Does not modify Reclaim
checklist.description: The agent does NOT also run 'npm run sync' — only the dry-run is executed

checklist.name: Reports preview results
checklist.description: After the command completes, the agent summarizes the timezone mappings that were previewed
